column1: "title": "Select Template and Pre-populate Post Creation Screen"
"description": "Validate that users can select a template from the curated list and the post creation screen is pre-populated with relevant prompts and formatting."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click on 'Create Post'
Navigate to the template selection section
Select a template from the curated list
Observe the post creation screen pre-populated with template prompts and formatting"
"expected": "Post creation screen should be pre-populated with relevant prompts and formatting based on the selected template"
"successCriteria": "Template selection triggers correct pre-population of post creation fields"
"title": "Mandatory Fields Enable Post Button for Good Reads Template"
"description": "Validate that the post button is enabled only after a valid online link is entered for the Good Reads template."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Select 'Good Reads' template
Enter invalid link in the link input field
Verify post button remains disabled
Enter a valid online link
Verify post button is enabled"
"expected": "Post button remains disabled until a valid online link is entered; enabled after valid link input"
"successCriteria": "Post button state correctly reflects mandatory link validation"
"title": "Mandatory Poster Text Enables Post Button for Seeking Mentorship Template"
"description": "Validate that the post button is enabled only after mandatory poster text is entered for Seeking Mentorship template."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Select 'Seeking Mentorship' template
Leave poster text empty
Verify post button is disabled
Enter valid poster text
Verify post button is enabled"
"expected": "Post button remains disabled until poster text is entered; enabled after valid input"
"successCriteria": "Post button state correctly reflects mandatory poster text validation"
"description": "Validate that users can upload attachments within specified limits for each template and receive appropriate feedback when limits are exceeded."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Select any template allowing attachments
Attempt to upload attachments exceeding max count or size
Verify system prevents upload and shows limitation info
Upload attachments within limits
Verify uploads succeed"
"expected": "Attachment upload limits enforced with user informed of restrictions; uploads within limits succeed"
"successCriteria": "Attachment upload restrictions are enforced and communicated to user"
"description": "Validate that the hashtag corresponding to the selected template name is auto-added to the post caption and is searchable."
"steps": "Open Vibe main feed\nClick 'Create Post'\nSelect a template (e.g.
column2:
'Good Reads')
Verify hashtag '#GoodReads' is auto-added to caption
Publish post
Search feed using hashtag '#GoodReads'
Verify post appears in search results"

column1: "expected": "Hashtag matching template name auto-added and searchable in feed"
"successCriteria": "Posts tagged with correct template hashtag and retrievable via search"
"title": "Template Discovery via Carousel on Main Feed"
"description": "Validate that users can discover templates via the carousel on the main feed and open template creation screen pre-populated."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Locate templates carousel
Scroll through carousel
Click on a template in carousel
Verify post creation screen opens with template pre-populated"
"expected": "Templates carousel visible and functional; clicking template opens pre-populated post creation screen"
"title": "First-Time User Sees Prioritized Templates and Sample Previews"
"description": "Validate that first-time users see prioritized templates (Ice Breaker
column2: Seeking Mentorship) and sample post previews for comfort."

column1:
"steps": "Login as a first-time user
Open 'Create Post' screen
Verify prioritized templates 'Ice Breaker' and 'Seeking Mentorship' are shown first
Verify sample post previews are displayed for these templates"
"expected": "First-time users see prioritized templates with sample previews"
"successCriteria": "Correct template prioritization and preview display for first-time users"
"description": "Validate that returning users see segregation of previously used templates and nudges for new topics."

"steps": "Login as a returning user
Open 'Create Post' screen
Verify templates previously contributed to are shown separately
Verify nudges highlight templates not yet contributed to"
"expected": "Returning users see segregated templates and nudges for new topics"
"successCriteria": "Template segregation and nudges correctly displayed for returning users"
"title": "Template Order Reverts to Original After 14 Days"
"description": "Validate that template order respects user status and reverts to original order after 14 days."

"steps": "Login as returning user
Open 'Create Post' screen
Verify template order reflects user status
Simulate passage of 14 days
Open 'Create Post' screen again
Verify template order has reverted to original"
"expected": "Template order changes based on user status and reverts after 14 days"
"successCriteria": "Template order logic functions correctly with time-based reversion"
"title": "Schedule Post with Date/Time and Edit Before Posting"
"description": "Validate that users can schedule posts with specific date/time and edit scheduled posts before publishing."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Select any template
Fill mandatory fields
Select schedule post option
Set future date/time
Save scheduled post
Navigate to scheduled posts
Edit scheduled post details
Save changes
Verify updated scheduled post details"
"expected": "Users can schedule posts and edit scheduled posts before publishing"
"successCriteria": "Scheduled posts created and editable before posting"
"description": "Validate that users can cancel scheduled posts before they are published."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Navigate to scheduled posts
Select a scheduled post
Click cancel/delete option
Confirm cancellation
Verify scheduled post is removed and not published"
"expected": "Scheduled post is cancelled and removed before publishing"
"successCriteria": "Scheduled posts can be cancelled successfully before posting"
"title": "Toggles for Comments & Replies Visibility and Behavior"
"description": "Validate toggle visibility and behavior for Allow Comments & Replies based on admin settings and user override."

"steps": "Login as regular user
Open 'Create Post'
Verify toggle for Allow Comments & Replies is visible only if admin enabled globally
Toggle comments off
Post content
Verify comments disabled on post
Login as admin
Open 'Create Post'
Verify toggle for Post On Behalf Of Company is visible
Post on behalf of company"
"expected": "Toggles appear and behave as per admin settings and user roles"
"successCriteria": "Toggle visibility and functionality conform to admin settings and user roles"

"title": "Content Body Character Limits Enforced as per Regular Post Settings"
"description": "Validate that content body character limits are enforced according to regular post configuration for all templates."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Select any template
Enter content exceeding character limit
Verify input is restricted or error message shown
Enter content within limit
Verify input accepted"
"expected": "Character limits enforced and user informed when exceeded"
"title": "Preview Option Available for Each Template Before Posting"
"description": "Validate that users can preview their post for each template type before submitting."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Select any template
Fill mandatory fields
Click 'Preview' button
Verify post preview is displayed correctly
Close preview
Submit post"
"expected": "Preview option available and shows accurate post preview before submission"
"title": "GPT Assistance Available for Content Generation After User Prompt"
"description": "Validate that GPT assistance is available for proofreading or writing posts after user inputs prompt or text."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Select any template
Enter prompt or partial text
Invoke GPT assistance
Verify GPT suggests content or proofreads input
Accept GPT suggestions
Verify content updated accordingly"
"expected": "GPT assistance available and functional after user prompt input"
"testData": "{\"prompt\":\"Help me write a post about team success\"}"
"successCriteria": "GPT assistance triggers and updates content as expected"
